task_completion.description: Verify that the requested parameter tracks were added to the Vital Recorder display.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Vital Recorder interface, the tracks 'Solar8000/HR', 'Solar8000/PLETH_SPO2', and 'Primus/ETCO2' should be visible in the main display area alongside the default waveform tracks.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Y-axis ranges for the added tracks are set to the requested clinical values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check the vertical axis numbers next to the newly added tracks in Vital Recorder. The HR track should show a range of 40 to 160, SpO2 should show 85 to 100, and ETCO2 should show 0 to 60.

task_completion.description: Verify that the three requested screenshots were saved to the output folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer window showing the 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\MandM\' folder should contain the image files 'full_timeline.png', 'induction_detail.png', and 'emergence_detail.png'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the intraoperative data segment was exported as a CSV file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file 'intraop_data.csv' should be visible in the 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\MandM\' folder.

task_completion.description: Verify that the case report text file was created in the output folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file 'case_report.txt' should be visible in the 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\MandM\' folder.

task_completion.description: Verify that the case report contains the correct documented information.
task_completion.visual_evidence: If 'case_report.txt' is open in a text editor or its contents are visible, it must correctly state: Total duration (3h 12m 22s), Surgical phase duration (145 mins), Devices and track counts (SNUADC: 4, Solar8000: 34, Primus: 32, BIS: 8), Invasive arterial monitoring (Yes/Present), and Volatile anesthetic monitoring (Yes/Present).

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually used the Vital Recorder application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Vital Recorder GUI should be visible in the screenshots, demonstrating the agent interacted with the actual application to view the tracks and configure the axes.

integrity.description: Ensure the generated image files are actual screenshots of the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: If the image files are opened or previewed, they should show genuine screenshots of the Vital Recorder interface (with waveforms and tracks), not placeholder images, blank screens, or text files renamed to .png.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent didn't just create empty files to satisfy the checklist.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'intraop_data.csv' file should have a plausible file size (not 0 KB) indicating it contains actual exported data, and the text report should contain actual extracted values rather than generic placeholder text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Total recording duration is exactly 3h 12m 22s (11,542 seconds).
